headline: How The Intel (INTC) Investment Story Is Shifting With New Analyst Assumptions And Risks
summary: Intel’s analyst fair value estimate has shifted from US$47.11 to US$75.42, marking a sizable reset in what many models now treat as the stock’s intrinsic value range. This change sits alongside a wave of fresh research, where several firms are lifting targets and updating assumptions while still flagging execution and competitive risks. As you read on, you will see how this evolving narrative is taking shape and what to watch as new opinions keep coming in. Analyst Price Targets don't always...
